description.intro: 8 years of development experience, mainly Node.js and TypeScript, with the same language on both frontend and backend. Currently an AI Engineer building dating-matching and interest-based meetup apps on my own, from product planning and AI implementation through to the iOS launch. Before that I led an 11-person engineering team on 12 game products, working on real-time interaction and high-concurrency scenarios.
description.specialization: Mostly NestJS on the backend and React on the frontend, and a lot of work on existing code: refactoring, splitting modules, adding tests, and fixing performance. I have also integrated Claude AI into a shipped product.
